name: Sandpoint
title: Light of the Lost Coast
description: Sandpoint is a small coastal town in Varisia, known as the 'Light of the Lost Coast.' It sits on the edge of the Varisian Gulf, built among the ruins of an ancient Thassilonian colony. The town is friendly and welcoming, though it has recently endured several tragedies known as the 'Late Unpleasantness.'
notable_features: The Old Light - ancient Thassilonian lighthouse ruin on the coast
Sandpoint Cathedral - newly rebuilt after the chapel fire
The Glassworks - Kaijitsu family glass factory
Chopper's Isle - haunted island in the harbor
Thistletop - goblin stronghold to the north
The Catacombs of Wrath - ancient tunnels beneath the town

locations.name: Sandpoint Cathedral
locations.description: A grand new cathedral dedicated to six deities: Desna, Erastil, Abadar, Shelyn, Gozreh, and Sarenrae. It was recently rebuilt after the previous chapel burned down during the Late Unpleasantness.
quests: Investigate the catacombs beneath the cathedral

locations.name: The Rusty Dragon
locations.description: The most popular tavern in Sandpoint, run by the exotic Ameiko Kaijitsu. It's a favorite of adventurers and travelers, known for excellent food and a welcoming atmosphere.

locations.name: The White Deer
locations.description: A refined inn and tavern run by Garridan Viskalai, a Shoanti man. It caters to a more upscale clientele than the Rusty Dragon.

locations.name: Savah's Armory
locations.description: The best place in Sandpoint to buy weapons and armor. Savah Bevaniky stocks a wide variety of martial equipment.
locations.stock_level: Standard martial weapons and armor, occasional masterwork items

locations.name: Vernah's Fine Clothing
locations.description: A clothing shop run by Rynshinn Povalli, known for exquisite designs.

locations.name: The Feathered Serpent
locations.description: An exotic shop selling magical curiosities, potions, scrolls, and unusual items. Run by the eccentric Vorvashali Voon.
locations.stock_level: Minor wondrous items, potions up to 3rd level, scrolls up to 4th level

locations.name: Bottled Solutions
locations.description: An alchemist's shop run by Niska Mvashti's apprentice. Sells alchemical supplies and potions.
locations.stock_level: Alchemist's fire, antitoxin, thunderstones, tanglefoot bags

locations.name: The Hagfish
locations.description: A waterfront tavern known for Norah, a large hagfish kept in a tank. Patrons who drink the water from Norah's tank and keep it down have their names inscribed on the ceiling. The current prize is 28 gold pieces.

locations.name: Sandpoint Garrison
locations.description: The town's military headquarters, home to the town guard and sheriff. A sturdy stone building with a small jail.

locations.name: Town Hall
locations.description: The seat of Sandpoint's government, where Mayor Kendra Deverin holds court and the town council meets.

locations.name: The Old Light
locations.description: The ruins of an ancient Thassilonian lighthouse on the western cliff edge of town. Brodert Quink believes it was once a war machine, not just a lighthouse.
quests: Research the Old Light's true purpose

locations.name: Kaijitsu Glassworks
locations.description: The town's famous glassworks, owned by the Kaijitsu family. Produces exquisite glassware known throughout Varisia. Currently run by Lonjiku Kaijitsu.

locations.name: Sandpoint Lumber Mill
locations.description: One of Sandpoint's oldest industries, the lumber mill processes timber from the surrounding forests.
quests: Investigate murders at the lumber mill

locations.name: General Store
locations.description: Ven Vinder's general store stocks everything an adventurer might need for daily living.
locations.stock_level: All standard adventuring gear, rations, rope, tools

locations.name: Sandpoint Savories
locations.description: A beloved bakery run by Alma Avertin, sister of the murdered Father Ezakien Tobyn's assistant.

locations.name: The Pixie's Kitten
locations.description: Sandpoint's brothel, run by the beautiful and shrewd Kaye Tesarani. A well-kept establishment with a good reputation.

locations.name: Sandpoint Theater
locations.description: The largest theater in Sandpoint, run by the flamboyant Cyrdak Drokkus. Regular performances draw crowds from across the region.

locations.name: Fatman's Feedbag
locations.description: A rough and tumble tavern near the waterfront, popular with dock workers and sailors. Known for cheap drinks and bar fights.

locations.name: Turandarok Academy
locations.description: Sandpoint's school and orphanage, run by the patient and dedicated Ilsoari Gandethus. Also serves as the town's de facto library and sage.

locations.name: Sandpoint Boneyard
locations.description: The town's cemetery, maintained by the sexton Naffer Vosk. Recently disturbed by unknown forces.

locations.name: The Curious Goblin
locations.description: A small bookshop run by Chask Haladan, specializing in maps, books, and rare texts.

locations.name: Goblin Squash Stables
locations.description: The town stables, run by Daviren Hosk, a retired ranger with a deep hatred of goblins. Goblin ears decorate the walls.

locations.name: Sandpoint Shipyard
locations.description: A small but functional shipyard that services the fishing fleet and occasional merchant vessels.

locations.name: Risa's Place
locations.description: A quiet tavern run by the nearly blind Risa Magravi. Known for its calm atmosphere and home-cooked meals.

key_npcs.name: Mayor Kendra Deverin
key_npcs.description: The charismatic and capable mayor of Sandpoint. A skilled politician who genuinely cares about her town.

key_npcs.name: Sheriff Belor Hemlock
key_npcs.description: Sandpoint's serious and dedicated sheriff. A former Shoanti warrior who left his tribe to protect the town.

key_npcs.name: Ameiko Kaijitsu
key_npcs.description: The beautiful and spirited owner of the Rusty Dragon. A former adventurer from the noble Kaijitsu family, she rejected her family's expectations to run a tavern.
key_npcs.personality: Spirited, independent, charismatic, secretive about her past

key_npcs.name: Father Abstalar Zantus
key_npcs.description: The head priest of Sandpoint Cathedral. A kind and gentle man who tends to the spiritual needs of the community.

key_npcs.name: Shalelu Andosana
key_npcs.description: An elven ranger who serves as Sandpoint's unofficial guardian against goblin tribes in the surrounding wilderness. She spends most of her time in the wild.

key_npcs.name: Brodert Quink
key_npcs.description: Sandpoint's resident sage and expert on Thassilonian history. He's obsessed with the Old Light and ancient Thassilonian ruins.

key_npcs.name: Lonjiku Kaijitsu
key_npcs.description: The stern and cold head of the Kaijitsu family. Owner of the Sandpoint Glassworks. Father to Ameiko and Tsuto.

key_npcs.name: Aldern Foxglove
key_npcs.description: A charming Magnimarian noble who visits Sandpoint frequently. He develops an unhealthy obsession with the PCs after they save him during the goblin attack.
key_npcs.personality: Charming, generous, secretly obsessive and unstable
key_npcs.plot_role: Major villain in Chapter 2 (The Skinsaw Man)

key_npcs.name: Nualia Tobyn
key_npcs.description: The supposedly dead adopted daughter of the late Father Tobyn. She was driven mad by her celestial heritage and the cruelty of the townsfolk, and now seeks to become a demon by offering Sandpoint to Lamashtu.
key_npcs.personality: Vengeful, fanatical, bitter, charismatic among her followers

key_npcs.name: Tsuto Kaijitsu
key_npcs.description: Ameiko's half-brother, born from an affair. Rejected by the Kaijitsu family, he fell in with Nualia and now helps coordinate goblin attacks on Sandpoint.
key_npcs.personality: Bitter, cunning, manipulative, obsessed with Nualia

key_npcs.name: Daviren Hosk
key_npcs.description: Retired ranger who runs the Goblin Squash Stables. Hates goblins with a burning passion and decorates his stables with their ears.
key_npcs.personality: Gruff, goblin-hating, reliable, good with horses

key_npcs.name: Niska Mvashti
key_npcs.description: The oldest person in Sandpoint, a Varisian fortune teller and druid. She has prophetic visions and deep knowledge of the region.

goblin_tribes.name: Birdcruncher Goblins
goblin_tribes.notes: The closest tribe to Sandpoint, relatively small

goblin_tribes.name: Licktoad Goblins
goblin_tribes.notes: Known for their love of fire and fireworks

goblin_tribes.name: Seven Tooth Goblins
goblin_tribes.notes: Named for their habit of collecting teeth

goblin_tribes.name: Mosswood Goblins
goblin_tribes.notes: The largest local tribe, led by a hobgoblin

goblin_tribes.name: Thistletop Goblins
goblin_tribes.notes: The most organized tribe, occupying an ancient Thassilonian fortress. Allied with Nualia.

the_late_unpleasantness.description: A series of tragic events that struck Sandpoint five years ago.

events.name: Chopper's Murders
events.description: A serial killer known as 'Chopper' (actually Jervis Stoot, a local artist) murdered 25 people over a month, carving away their eyes and tongues. He was eventually discovered and killed in his lair on Stoot's Rock (now called Chopper's Isle).

events.name: The Chapel Fire
events.description: A month after Chopper's rampage ended, the Sandpoint Chapel burned to the ground. Father Ezakien Tobyn and his adopted daughter Nualia perished in the fire (or so everyone believes). The fire was actually set by Nualia herself as part of her descent into evil.

surrounding_area.name: Nettlewood
surrounding_area.description: Dense, thorny forest between Sandpoint and Thistletop. Home to goblins and other dangers.

surrounding_area.name: Devil's Platter
surrounding_area.description: A large mesa west of Sandpoint, home to the Birdcruncher goblins.

surrounding_area.name: Brinestump Marsh
surrounding_area.description: A boggy marshland south of Sandpoint. The Licktoad goblins live here.

surrounding_area.name: Mosswood
surrounding_area.description: A vast forest southeast of Sandpoint. Home to the largest goblin tribe.

surrounding_area.name: Shank's Wood
surrounding_area.description: A smaller forest east of Sandpoint, home to the Seven Tooth goblins.

surrounding_area.name: Tickwood
surrounding_area.description: A forest known for its large tick population. A good source of timber.

surrounding_area.name: The Tors
surrounding_area.description: Rocky, hilly terrain north of Sandpoint. Rumored to contain ancient ruins.

surrounding_area.name: Foxglove Manor
surrounding_area.description: A haunted mansion south of Sandpoint along the Lost Coast Road. Known locally as 'The Misgivings.'

surrounding_area.name: Magnimar
surrounding_area.description: The nearest large city, about 50 miles south. A major trading hub and the political center of the region.

surrounding_area.name: Thistletop
surrounding_area.description: An island fortress connected to the mainland by a rope bridge. Ancient Thassilonian ruins beneath goblin-occupied surface structures.
